The '''27th Denarian Fleet''' was a formation of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] which included 520 [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]]. When the Empire decided to sell off all the ''Victory''-class [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in the fleet to make room for the newer [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], the ships were stripped of weapons and sold off to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority's]] [[Picket Fleet/Legends|Picket Fleet]].
